data.title: DOGE price may hit $0.10 resistance soon, aiming for $0.14 by end of 2026. Currently at $0.09 with RSI at 49.30.
data.description: The current trading price of Dogecoin stands at $0.09, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral value of 49.30. Analysis of the technical indicators indicates a possible challenge of the $0.10 resistance level in the near future. Analysts are optimistic, projecting a target range of $0.10 to $0.14 for Dogecoin by the conclusion of 2026.

data.title: Polygon's MATIC may reach $0.45 by May 2026. Currently trading at $0.38 with RSI at 38, potential bounce to $0.45-$0.52 with resistance breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently trading at $0.38 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a price recovery to the range of $0.45 to $0.52 within the next 6 weeks if a key resistance level is breached.

data.title: SOL trading at $84.38 may reach $90-95 by late April 2026 if $87.22 level is breached in 2-3 weeks. RSI at 49.69.
data.description: The current trading price of SOL is $84.38, with a neutral RSI of 49.69. Analysts predict a potential upward movement towards a resistance zone of $90-95 if the bulls can surpass the $87.22 level within the next 2-3 weeks. This indicates a possible increase in value of $5.62 to $10.62 per unit if the stated conditions are met.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.38 breakout by mid-2026, currently at $0.25. Analysts watch $0.26 resistance for bullish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano (ADA) is currently maintaining a neutral stance at a value of $0.25, as per technical analysis. Analysts are setting a mid-2026 target of $0.38 for this digital asset. In order for a bullish trend to continue, it is crucial for Cardano to surpass a key resistance level at $0.26.

data.title: XRP hovers at $1.35, facing potential breakout to $1.50 by April end. Indicators show consolidation at $1.32-$1.42.
data.description: Currently, XRP is valued at $1.35 and is experiencing a neutral momentum. Key technical indicators indicate a possible consolidation phase within the range of $1.32 to $1.42. Analysts project a target range of $1.50 to $1.80 if the resistance at $1.42 is successfully breached.

data.title: BNB expected to consolidate around $600, targeting $630 by May 2026 after neutral trading at $606.40.
data.description: The cryptocurrency BNB is currently trading at $606.40, while technical indicators are showing a neutral stance. Market analysis indicates that there may be a period of consolidation between the price range of $594 to $616 before a possible breakout towards the $630 resistance level in the next four weeks.

data.title: Ethereum at $2,234 eyes $2,400 breakout with RSI 59, suggesting neutral momentum. Possible pullback to $2,148 support.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $2,234, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 59, indicating neutral momentum. Analysis indicates that ETH may either target the $2,400 resistance level or possibly experience a pullback to the $2,148 support level in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: Bitcoin's price target set at $76,000 by May 2026 with current price at $72,766 and RSI of 60.40. Breakout expected in 4 weeks reaching resistance level.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin stands at $72,766, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 60.40, indicating a neutral momentum. Analysts predict a possible breakout to the $76,000 resistance level within the next four weeks based on technical analysis.

data.title: SINGAPORE STRENGTHENS SARCOMA CARE THROUGH COORDINATED, MULTIDISCIPLINARY APPROACH
data.description: A recent initiative led by NCIS aims to enhance sarcoma care in Singapore by developing comprehensive guidance to improve diagnosis, referrals, and outcomes related to this rare group of bone and soft tissue cancers. The multi-institutional effort is focused on providing expert multidisciplinary strategies. This move comes as Singapore intensifies efforts to address sarcoma cases, which affect a limited number of individuals. The endeavor, initiated on April 11, 2026, is part of a broader strategy to enhance healthcare services for patients grappling with sarcoma in the country.

data.title: China Daily: Guizhou finds its voice through global storytellers
data.description: In Guizhou, China, on April 11, 2026, a media tour showcased the southwestern province as a convergence point of ancient culture, unspoiled nature, and contemporary narratives. Elliot Maldonado's report emphasized this unique blend. The China Storyteller Partnerships initiated in the mountainous region of Southwest China, introducing an innovative approach that aims to amplify the voices of the locals. This initiative bridges traditional heritage with modern storytelling techniques, offering a platform for the community to share their stories.

data.title: Arizona's crackdown on Kalshi's event contracts blocked by federal court. Officials barred from enforcing gambling laws per CFTC.
data.description: In Arizona, a federal judge has issued a temporary order preventing state officials from implementing gambling regulations on Kalshi. The decision was made in favor of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).

data.title: CGTN: One family: Xi Jinping stresses keeping future of cross-Strait ties in Chinese hands
data.description: On April 11, 2026, an article was released by CGTN regarding the encounter between Xi Jinping, the general secretary of the Communist Party of China (CPC) Central Committee, and Cheng Li-wun, the chairwoman of the Chinese Kuomintang (KMT) party. The meeting holds significance due to its content, with detailed discussions between the two leaders.

data.title: Bitwise nears Hyperliquid ETF launch with updated filing, introducing $BHYP ticker with 0.67% fee; launch imminent – Bloomberg analyst.
data.description: In its most recent filing, Bitwise introduced the symbol $BHYP along with a management fee of 0.67%, as detected by a senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg. This move indicates a possible upcoming debut by Bitwise in the financial market.

data.title: XRP shows signs of bottoming as it holds crucial support level, hinting at potential trend reversal.
data.description: Indicators from both technical analysis and on-chain data suggest a potential turnaround in the XRP price, catching the attention of traders. The focus lies on whether a critical support level will be maintained.

data.title: GeeLark Helps Social Media Teams Save Over 120 Hours Monthly by Replacing Manual Device Farms
data.description: Singapore-based company GeeLark introduced advanced automation features on April 11, 2026, cutting down account management time for social media teams by more than 70%. This enhancement allows teams to save around 120 hours monthly. The new automation capabilities are aimed at helping teams in managing their social media accounts more efficiently.

data.title: Europe in economic distress as tensions with Russia, China, and U.S. rise, resembling "Mean Girls" scenario.
data.description: Europe currently faces strained relationships with major global powers, with tensions rising with Russia, China, and the U.S. This situation mirrors the dynamics of the popular movie "Mean Girls," where Europe seems to be caught in the middle of international rivalries. The continent must navigate these delicate relationships to ensure stability and cooperation on the global stage.

data.title: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. Announces Intention to Amend and Refile Financial Statements and MD&A
data.description: Vancouver-based company, Digital Asset Technologies Inc. (CSE: DATT) (OTCPK: DGTEF) (FSE: 9880), announced on April 10, 2026, that in response to a review by the British Columbia Securities Commission (BCSC), they plan to revise and refile specific financial statements and attached management’s discussion and analysis (MD&A). This decision stems from a continuous disclosure examination conducted by the BCSC.

data.title: Splashdown! Lockheed Martin-Built Orion Spacecraft Safely Returns Astronauts to Earth, Completing NASA's Artemis II Mission
data.description: In a significant milestone for space exploration, the first crewed deep space mission in over five decades has reaffirmed the viability of the Orion spacecraft for future lunar exploration. The Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT)-manufactured Orion craft completed a round trip of 694,481 miles to the Moon and back. The successful splashdown in the Pacific Ocean marks a crucial step towards advancing space missions and exploration.

data.title: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. Clarifying News Release
data.description: Digital Asset Technologies Inc. (CSE: DATT) (OTCPK: DGTEF) (FSE: 988) is a technology-focused investment issuer based in Vancouver, BC. The company has released a statement in compliance with the British Columbia Securities Commission's request to address inaccuracies in its previous news releases dated June 30, 2025 and May 7, 2025. This supplemental release aims to provide corrected and clarifying information regarding the Prior Disclosures made by the company earlier.

data.title: Autel Showcases Ultra-Fast EV Charging in Thailand, Combining 780A High-Current Performance with Seamless App Experience
data.description: In Bangkok, Autel Energy recently unveiled its ultra-fast EV charging solution at Beans2Cup@Ratchada, Thailand on April 10th, showcasing its efficiency to the public. This marks a significant development in the EV charging sector, with the deployment aiming to provide quicker and more convenient charging options. The live demonstration highlighted the technology's capabilities and its potential impact on the EV industry. This event underlines Autel Energy's dedication to promoting sustainable transportation solutions and advancing the adoption of EVs in the region.
